title: Make tracked-asset market-stream subscription recover when discovery/token mapping becomes available
objective: Prevent the market stream from staying subscribed to zero assets indefinitely when open positions exist but token mapping was initially unavailable, while keeping fallback behavior intact.
acceptance_criteria: open positions no longer leave stream subscribed to zero assets indefinitely
tracked asset mapping can recover after discovery refresh
market stream resubscribes when token IDs become available
rollback: Revert the narrow recompute/resubscribe changes in dashboard_server.py and core/market_stream.py.
